COPYING FEES (9 PAGE) PAID BY PLAINTIFF WALKER, BLAKE
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF SEP-08-2010 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF WALKER, BLAKE RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT WALKER, AMA $747.71 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $747.71, ALTHOUGH PLAINTIFF WAS BOUND BY A RESTRAINING ORDER TO MOVE OUT OF THE PREMISES, THAT ORDER IS NOT THE SAME AS A JUDGMENT OR ORDER QUARANTINE DEFENDANT POSSESSIONS OUT THE PREMISES IN THE UNLAWFUL DETAINER. PLAINTIFF RETAINED HIS RIGHT OF POSSESSION OF THE RENTED PREMISES UNTIL DEFENDANT OBTAINED APPROPRIATE RELIEF. THE COURT DETERMINES PLAINTIFF'S DAMAGES TO BE $1284.97; BUT GRANTS DEFENDANT AN OFFSET OF $537.26 FOR DAMAGES CAUSED BY PLAINTIFF. THE JUDGMENT IS A NET AWARD. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
NOTICE TO JUDGMENT CREDITOR OF DEPOSIT OF FILED BY DEFENDANT WALKER, AMA
JUDGMENT CREDITOR'S REQUEST FOR FUNDS FILED BY PLAINTIFF WALKER, BLAKE AS TO DEFENDANT WALKER, AMA

ORDER ON REQUEST TO APPEAR BY TELEPHONE IS "DENIED". "IN LIEU OF APPEARANCE BY TELEPHONE, PLAINTIFF MAY REQUEST A CONTINUANCE OF HEARING TO A DATE WHEN HE WILL BE AVAILABLE TO APPEAR PERSONALLY", PER COMMISSIONER PAUL SLAVIT.
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED JUL-01-2011 ORDERED DESTROYED
REFUND/REIMBURSEMENT OF $747.71 RE 27151 FOR TRANSACTION W0410B08D001 (DEPOSIT OF JUDGMENT), PAYABLE TO BLAKE WALKER, DOC #1903583142, WARRANT #38200671, DATED APR-01-2011
SUBPOENA ISSUED TO OFFICE GREGORY BURCHARD #2229 (SUBPOENA FILED BY DEFENDANT)

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF SEP-08-2010 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF SEP-08-2010 BY PAUL SLAVIT. PLAINTIFF APPEARS BY TELEPHONE. PLAINTIFF'S EXHIBITS RETAINED. DEFENDANT PRESENT IN COURT. DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT
SUBPOENA ISSUED TO OFFICER TIMOTHY GIBSON 3G3A #1752 (SUBPOENA FILED BY DEFENDANT)
